rows.description: Debentur computand. ex pede superius corporum
rows.notes: Overrode both extractors based on visual verification. gemini-flash misread the first two words and the end of the last word. gpt-5-mini misread most of the line after the first two words, and incorrectly merged this line with the subsequent header.
rows.section_header: Debentur computand. ex pede superius corporum

rows.notes: Taken from gemini-flash as gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this line with the previous header and thus missed it as a distinct row.
Consensus across both extractors for description and amounts.

rows.notes: Used gpt-5-mini's description, which is visually accurate ('Longwittenham' vs 'Longprittenham' from gemini-flash). Pounds and shillings were consistent. Visually verified pence as '0', confirming gpt-5-mini and contradicting gemini-flash's '3'.
